name: Doublefedora (BUT ROYAL AU WOWSERS)
description:
So this is an au where Chance is a prince and Don is a knight. Chance already had an arranged marriage but he lowkey wanna marry that chick (wild). So Don has a small crush on Chance but he knows he can't like... do anything about it because nobody would approve. When Chance was small he went to the forest to explore and he met Don sitting in a flower field and Chancejust decided to be friends. After like a couple months of being friends, Chance brought Don to his parents asking if he could like... be a knight and stuff.

yuh
